column1: Luis Arraez leads the slate with exceptional reliability, riding a recent hot streak and batting leadoff for Colorado in a favorable park with the platoon advantage. Bobby Witt Jr. offers steady production near the top of Kansas City's order and also benefits from a strong matchup at home. Otto Lopez brings consistency as well, but Arraez’s combination of contact skills and advantageous setup makes him the clear top choice for Beat The Streak players tonight.
